name: think-tags
description: Pi extension that splits <think> tags into collapsible thinking blocks in assistant messages
readme:
# think-tags

A [pi](https://pi.dev) extension that splits `<think>` tags in assistant messages into collapsible thinking blocks.

## Install

```bash
pi install npm:think-tags
```

## Usage

Once installed, any `<think>...</think>` blocks in assistant responses will be rendered as collapsible thinking blocks in the TUI.
